content: Apple is in discussions with AI startup PrismML about deploying its compressed 27-billion-parameter model on iPhones. PrismML has successfully shrunk the large model to run smoothly on Apple's smartphone. The talks follow Apple's broader AI strategy, which includes plans for a 1-trillion-parameter self-developed model, expanded AI teams, earlier partnerships with Google for Gemini access, and efforts to enhance Siri through both on-device and cloud-based approaches.

content: OpenAI offers a Bio Bounty program for GPT-5.5, inviting researchers to identify biological safety risks. Participants find vulnerabilities in the model's handling of biological information. The program aims to improve safeguards against potential misuse for harmful biological applications. Submissions undergo review, with rewards based on severity and impact. title: Mark Zuckerberg & Priscilla Chan: How AI Will Help Cure Disease
content: Mark Zuckerberg and Priscilla Chan discuss the Chan Zuckerberg Initiative's goal to help cure, prevent, and manage disease by 2100. Rather than funding individual breakthroughs, CZI builds tools and infrastructure to accelerate scientific discovery, including Biohub, Cell Atlas, virtual cell models, and open biological datasets. They explore how AI could help researchers test hypotheses before expensive experiments and how combining advanced biology with AI may unlock a new era of medical discovery.

title: 福建晋江一鞋厂发生火灾已致 28 人死亡，应急管理部派出联合工作组赶赴现场指导，目前情况如何？
content: A fire at Huiteng Shoe Industry's factory in Jinjiang, Fujian province killed 28 people. The blaze began around noon on July 9 at the facility in Chentou village. China's Ministry of Emergency Management dispatched a joint task force to the scene and directed rescue operations. Local fire services deployed 183 personnel and 35 vehicles. The Ministry demanded a full investigation into the cause and stricter measures to prevent similar incidents. Firefighting efforts were ongoing.

title: 华为天才少年与DeepSeek冲突背后，梁文锋的人才观是什么？
content: DeepSeek is rapidly expanding its workforce, aiming to double its team size with 121 open positions across engineering, research, and specialized roles. The hiring push follows a major funding round and coincides with significant talent losses—at least 5 core researchers have joined competitors like ByteDance, Tencent, and Xiaomi. Team lead Cui Tianyi has adopted aggressive, broad recruiting for the new Agent Harness team, targeting both researchers and engineers without rigid nationality or experience requirements. CEO Liang Wenfeng, who also serves as CTO and actively contributes to research, prioritizes capability over experience, particularly favoring young talent willing to experiment rather than rely on established methods.

title: 揭秘Momenta：马斯克式CEO、AI执念和量产机器丨深氪
content: Momenta, a Chinese autonomous driving company founded by CEO Cao Xudong, went public in Hong Kong with a $70 billion market cap. Unlike competitors who focused on L4 autonomy, Cao prioritized L2 mass production early, achieving over 50%定点车型 market share and 60%量产 vehicle share. The company maintains extreme engineering efficiency—delivering 1 million vehicles with just 1,000+ employees. Cao, often compared to Musk for his hands-on engineering focus, enforces strict efficiency standards, reportedly considering even 1,000 employees excessive. Momenta now faces intensifying competition from Huawei, Horizon Robotics, and others crowding the L2 space, while preparing for futurebattlegrounds in L4, world models, and robotics by 2027-2028.

Runjian's Wuxiang Valley Token Factory addresses this by integrating energy, computing, and network into a unified system, optimizing across NVIDIA's "five-layer AI cake" from power to applications. The facility achieves PUE below industry average, 57% cluster utilization, and 30% faster first-token response. Leveraging Guangxi's low-cost green electricity, cross-border connectivity to ASEAN, and "data processing" pilot policies, Runjian has completed 500+ digital projects in ASEAN markets.

title: 广西回应六蓝水库现状：水库水位已降到大坝基岩以下，水库缺口和流量已基本稳定，已对上坝道路进行修复，今天起将组织开展河道疏通清淤 | 原文
content: Guangxi officials reported that the water level at Lanliu Reservoir has dropped below the dam's bedrock, and the breach and outflow have stabilized. Access roads to the dam were repaired starting July 8 and reached the crest by July 9. River dredging and desilting operations began the same day. The reservoir, built in 1958 in Hengzhou, experienced overtopping that began July 6. Experts have since assessed the breach, monitored water levels, dam deformation, and discharge rates to prevent further deterioration. Yunbiao Reservoir's water level has also dropped to its minimum operating level.

title: 我见证了 MiniMax 的“至暗时刻”
content: MiniMax, a fast-growing Chinese AI company, faced a crisis after launching its native multimodal model M3 in June. The company switched to a token-based pricing plan without adequately notifying users, sparking backlash that caused its stock to drop 15.71%. Internal arguments erupted in its flat, transparent organization, but employees resolved issues quickly through direct, fact-based confrontation rather than blame. Founder IO (Yan Junjie) apologized to all staff and emphasized refocusing on model quality. The episode revealed MiniMax's culture of information sharing ("context"), low ego, and relentless scaling ambition—from "Mini" resources toward "Max" capability.

title: 中国鱼子酱，占领头等舱
content: Kaluga Queen, China's top caviar producer, listed on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange on June 30, 2026, with shares surging 51% on debut. The company dominates global caviar with 36% market share and serves major airlines' first-class cabins. However, it faces three key risks: over-reliance on caviar sales (90.8% of revenue), heavy dependence on overseas OEM contracts (68.6% of revenue), and volatile biological assets comprising 57% of total assets. Domestic market growth remains weak.

title: 现在安卓手机数据迁移方便吗？
content: Current Android data migration in China mainly relies on manufacturers' proprietary tools, working best within the same brand. Cross-brand migration is possible but less seamless than iPhone's unified experience. Region-locked versions (domestic vs. Hong Kong/Japanese) create compatibility barriers. Google's backup services are blocked in mainland China, further complicating cross-region transfers. Each ecosystem uses different mechanisms—no universal solution exists, unlike Apple's integrated approach.

title: GPT-6要来了，OpenAI彻底抛弃4T旧底座
content: OpenAI accelerated GPT-6's release timeline and abandoned its 4T-parameter "Spud" foundation for a larger new pre-training base, aiming to compete with Anthropic's upcoming Fable 5.1. GPT-5.6 was fully released on July 9 after clearing U.S. government safety reviews, with three models: Sol (frontier reasoning, coding, science), Terra (mid-tier cost-performance), and Luna (speed and low-cost agent tasks). Early testers praised Sol's persistence and reliability, though comparisons with Fable 5 show trade-offs between deep insight and execution diligence.

title: 雷军开始抢李想的饭碗
content: Xiaomi launched SkyNomad, a new sub-brand targeting family-oriented mid-to-large extended-range SUVs priced between 200,000–450,000 RMB, directly competing with Li Auto's core market. This marks Xiaomi's shift from a single-product company to a multi-brand automotive platform. While Xiaomi's SU7 and YU7 succeeded with tech-savvy young buyers, SkyNomad pursues family users prioritizing space, comfort, and range anxiety relief. The move reflects industry-wide evolution from technology competition to brand matrix expansion, though Xiaomi faces challenges building family-user trust, adapting distribution channels, and developing organizational capabilities to manage multiple brands.

title: 突发：马斯克交卷最强Grok 4.5，Opus最高级智能打骨折价
content: SpaceXAI released Grok 4.5, its most powerful model to date, developed with Cursor and trained on tens of thousands of Nvidia GB300 GPUs. The model achieves competitive benchmark scores: 64.7% on SWE Bench Pro, 83.3% on Terminal Bench 2.1, and 62.0% on DeepSWE 1.0, roughly matching GPT-5.5 and approaching Opus 4.8. Its key advantage is efficiency—it uses 4.2× fewer tokens than Opus 4.8 while delivering 80 TPS inference speed. Pricing is $2/$6 per million tokens for input/output. Musk teased a major upgrade next month with real-world engineering integration across his companies.

content: DeepCtrls, a physical AI company focused on energy infrastructure, raised hundreds of millions of yuan in Series B funding from JinkoSolar, SDIC Innovation, and returning investors including Sequoia China. The company develops proprietary PhyAI engines that combine physical mechanisms with AI to achieve autonomous optimization and closed-loop control of industrial energy systems, advancing beyond diagnostic tools to Level 4/5 autonomous intelligence. Since 2023 commercialization, DeepCtrls has achieved consecutive revenue doubling and profitability, serving over 360 enterprise clients including TSMC and Tencent. The funding will advance R&D, scale its DeepBot product, and expand into Southeast Asia, Middle East, and Western markets.

title: OpenAI 前研究员田永龙加入腾讯混元多模态团队
content: Former OpenAI researcher Tian Yonglong has joined Tencent to lead its Hunyuan multimodal team and oversee visual language model development. A top computer vision expert, Tian previously worked with Tencent's current chief AI scientist Yao Shunyu at OpenAI. His hiring is part of Tencent's year-long restructuring and talent acquisition since establishing a dedicated multimodal department in April 2025, aiming to strengthen the company's capabilities in multimodal and visual perception technology.

title: 小红书 IPO 遭前员工实名举报
content: Former Xiaohongshu sales leader Chen Hao filed a real-name complaint to Hong Kong regulators on June 28 regarding the company's IPO compliance. Chen, identifying as an ordinary employee rather than executive, alleged malicious dismissal during his father's terminal illness, fabricated termination excuses, and unpaid option cancellations. Over 50 former colleagues reportedly experienced similar pre-vesting dismissals. Chen seeks investigation and apology rather than additional compensation, citing corporate governance deficiencies.

title: 蚂蚁集团入股薄荷健康，持股超 28% 成最大外部股东

The companies will collaborate on professional AI health services, focusing on weight management scenarios. Their first joint feature, "photo food calorie detection," has launched on Ant's app. Further cooperation will include scientific weight loss, food e-commerce, and AI model training.

The computer PhD from USTC's youth class joined Huawei in 2019, left in 2023 to join Pine AI as chief scientist, then departed to pursue foundational model research. He defended himself against accusations of lacking contractual integrity from Huobi co-founder Du Jun, claiming only $500,000 of $1.5 million investment arrived, causing operational difficulties. He clarified he was not Pine's founder and that the company remains healthy.

title: 字节跳动调整绩效方案：加大激励力度，引入期权发放
content: ByteDance adjusted its 2026 mid-year performance evaluation, launching July 15. Key changes include increased incentives: employees with E+ performance will have bonuses calculated from monthly total compensation rather than base salary, paid as 25% cash and 75% performance stock options/RSU vesting monthly. The company also strengthened assessments of its "ByteStyle" culture and leadership, allowing performance adjustments when behavioral and output ratings diverge.

South Korea's KOSPI index has entered a technical bear market, falling over 20% from June highs after a 120% year-to-date surge. The market's heavy dependence on Samsung and SK Hynix amplifies volatility. Concerns about AI infrastructure returns and hyperscaler profitability have driven foreign investor exits. Single-stock leveraged ETFs tracking these chipmakers—attracting over one-third of market turnover—have created a vicious cycle of amplified losses and selling pressure through daily rebalancing. SK Hynix's upcoming Nasdaq ADR listing may trigger arbitrage shorting of Korean shares. Long-term resilience requires diversifying beyond tech and improving corporate governance to address Korea's persistent valuation discount.

title: 刚刚，ChatGPT 语音大升级，奥特曼：既神奇也真实
content: OpenAI launched GPT-Live, a full-duplex voice model enabling natural, non-turn-based conversations. It can listen while speaking, provide filler responses, wait during pauses, resist background noise, and perform real-time translation. The system decouples front-end interaction from back-end reasoning, delegating complex tasks to GPT-5.5 while maintaining conversation flow. Benchmarks show major improvements in fluency and expert-level reasoning. Features include visual cards, preset voices only, safety interventions, parental controls, and emotional dependency monitoring. Available now on iOS, Android, and web for paid users (full version) and free users (mini).

Organizations cite his overly close personal relationship with U.S. President Donald Trump as a serious departure from the Olympic Charter's core requirement of political and commercial independence. His December 2025 presentation of the FIFA Peace Award to Trump drew widespread criticism, including from European Parliament members and the Norwegian Football Association.

title: 广电终于干掉了机顶盒，但现在没多少人看电视了
content: China's broadcasting regulator is phasing out cable TV set-top boxes by 2027 through "integrated TVs" with built-in live streaming, simplified remotes, and HDMI adapters for older sets. However, TV sales have collapsed from 50.89 million units in 2016 to 27.63 million in 2025, with daily usage rates falling from 70% to 30%. Despite improved hardware, affordability, and rectified complaints about ads and fees, televisions have lost to mobile devices and on-demand streaming. Chinese manufacturers now thrive abroad—TCL overtook Samsung globally in December 2025—while domestic viewership, especially among youth, continues declining irreversibly.

content: Small-town China is replicating Zhang Xuefeng's college-advisory model after gaokao results emerge. Filling agencies target mid-to-low scorers (400–530 points) from county high schools, exploiting complex new admission rules involving 45 institution groups and 200+ majors. Anxious parents pay for packaged "certainty" as standardized sales tactics accelerate sign-ups. Former county resident Huang Lin exemplifies the new generation of advisors applying Zhang's commercialized approach in these secondary cities, where visible career prospects override other considerations amid information asymmetry.

title: 算力租赁要变天了
content: AI server depreciation practices by tech giants face scrutiny. CoreWeave, a GPU rental firm, exemplifies risks in "compute leasing": it borrows heavily using depreciating GPUs as collateral, amid shortening GPU lifecycles. Meta's entry as a competitor—renting idle AI capacity—threatens such debt-dependent middlemen. While hyperscalers' cloud commitments remain strong, overleveraged GPU brokers with thin margins face existential pressure if demand slows or pricing wars erupt.

title: 刚刚，字节最强图像模型杀回来了，17个案例深度实测Seedream 5.0 Pro
content:
ByteDance's Seed team released Seedream 5.0 Pro, an upgraded multimodal image generation model. It improves text-image alignment, structural coherence, text rendering, and visual aesthetics, with new capabilities in complex information visualization, precise interactive editing, realistic photography/portraits, and native multilingual generation.

Testing showed strong performance in commercial posters, realistic photography, and precise local editing. However, it still struggles with complex Chinese text, UI details, and character consistency. Compared to ChatGPT Images 2.0, it lags in photorealistic replication of social media screenshots and documents, though it shows clear momentum in professional design workflows.

title: Automating cross-repo documentation with GitHub Agentic Workflows
content: The Aspire team automated cross-repo documentation using GitHub Agentic Workflows, linking their product repo (microsoft/aspire) to their docs repo (microsoft/aspire.dev). The workflow triggers on merged pull requests, uses milestones to determine target branches, and drafts documentation via an AI agent with constrained permissions. Safe outputs ensure the agent never merges directly; instead, a narrowly scoped GitHub App creates draft pull requests for engineer review. Results: 82 docs PRs merged in Aspire 13.3-13.4 with 100% merge rate and 44.8-hour median turnaround. Security is enforced through explicit repo scoping, branch restrictions, and blocked protected files.

title: GitHub availability report: June 2026
content:
GitHub's June 2026 availability report details infrastructure progress and six incidents. Monolith traffic in Azure reached 45% in Central US after a deliberate pause following a May stability incident; a new stability gate was implemented before resuming. Git in Azure peaked at 43%, missing the 50% target due to routing decisions prioritizing user latency over speed. New services showed progress: pullsd handles 100% of anonymous pull request reads, reposd served 50% of Azure REST read traffic before pausing for Redis capacity, and the new users service offloads 500,000 queries per second. API rate limiting reached 97% at the Gateway, and client-side database load shedding runs on 5% of production traffic.

title: Ownership: do "temos um rojão na mão" até "não precisa mais pensar nisso"
content: Ownership in software development means taking full responsibility for solving a problem from start to finish, not just writing code. The author outlines a seven-step process: understanding the real problem before coding, designing solutions by considering edge cases and failure modes, executing with care and pride, verifying in production through manual testing, communicating changes to teammates and users, and monitoring after deployment. The author emphasizes that truly owning a task means ensuring the problem stays solved, which builds trust and enables career growth beyond seniority based on tenure alone.

title: 抑郁症“血清素假说”被推翻了，得了抑郁症，只吃药行不通了 | 原文
content: A 2022 umbrella review led by UCL's Joanna Moncrieff in Molecular Psychiatry challenged the serotonin hypothesis of depression by systematically examining decades of research and finding no consistent evidence linking serotonin imbalance to depression. The findings sparked ongoing debate in psychiatry and suggest that treating depression with medication alone may be insufficient, as depression involves biological, psychological, and social factors.

title: How GitHub Copilot enables zero DNS configuration for GitHub Pages
content: GitHub Copilot CLI automates DNS configuration for GitHub Pages custom domains, eliminating manual record editing. The workflow involves: publishing a site via Copilot CLI, registering an inexpensive domain (e.g., a .click domain for $2), enabling the Namecheap API, installing the Namecheap skill for Copilot CLI, and using natural language prompts to configure A and CNAME records automatically. The process includes approval checkpoints and automated verification of domain resolution and HTTPS functionality. The entire deployment—from empty repository to live custom domain with HTTPS—takes approximately 14 minutes. The approach works with any registrar offering an API by pointing Copilot to their documentation.
